current_life_events: It's been eight months since the breakup, and he's still adjusting to living alone; a recent expense report at work revealed unexpected financial strain from the split, and an upcoming performance review is making him anxious about his role.
mental_state: Feeling stuck in his personal and professional life, struggling to reconcile his identity outside of the relationship.
why_bringing_these_up_now: Upcoming performance review and financial strain have intensified feelings of stagnation and inadequacy, making it hard to move forward from the breakup.
